text_block_list.text:
I happen to spot Narita Taishin and am about to
call out to her when she stops me with a deadly
glare.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Halt! Don't you dare come any closer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can't deal with noisy dimwits like you or Ticket
right now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My head'll split apart if you screech at me like
you always do!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
One step closer... and I'll seriously punt you into
space.
choice_data_list: Should we cancel training today, then?
Should we cancel training today, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As if! I'll be fine once I rest for a bi—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: I really think you should rest.
I really think you should rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine! I'll go to the infirmary! You happy
now?!

She looks at me with the desperation of a
wounded beast as she stalks off.
